summary: Testing Indirect Cost Management navigation for Accountant and Super Admin roles. Accountant navigation works correctly. Super Admin has a sub-menu display bug.

ui_bugs.issue: When Super Admin clicks 'Finance' nav and lands on /financial-overview, the wrong sub-menu (GM module) is shown instead of Finance module sub-menu
ui_bugs.root_cause: Path '/financial-overview' exists in both '/financial-overview' module AND '/gm-dashboard' module in ROLE_SUB_MENUS. buildPathMap() overwrites, so '/financial-overview' maps to '/gm-dashboard' (last processed). Fix: Remove '/financial-overview' from GM sub-menu items (line 100), or modify buildPathMap logic.

action_items: Fix AppHeader.jsx line 100: Remove duplicate '/financial-overview' from GM sub-menu OR fix buildPathMap logic to prioritize exact module key match
critical_code_review_comments: AppHeader.jsx line 97-103: '/financial-overview' path in GM sub-menu causes path mapping conflict. When navigating to /financial-overview, getModuleKey() returns '/gm-dashboard' instead of '/financial-overview', showing wrong sub-menu.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accountant Indirect Costs nav works perfectly. Super Admin has a bug where clicking Finance shows GM sub-menu. Direct navigation to /indirect-costs works for both roles.

steps: Verify 'Indirect Costs' in main nav bar
Verify page loads with Budget Overview and project data

Super Admin - Finance Nav to Indirect Co.issue: Sub-nav shows GM items instead of Finance items after clicking Finance

steps: Page loads correctly with Budget Overview
Sub-nav correctly shows Finance module items including 'Indirect Costs'

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In AppHeader.jsx, ROLE_SUB_MENUS.super_admin has '/financial-overview' path listed under both '/financial-overview' module key (line 80-86) AND '/gm-dashboard' module key (line 97-103). The buildPathMap() function (line 115-122) iterates through all modules and creates a path-to-module mapping. Since JavaScript object iteration order is insertion order, '/financial-overview' gets mapped to '/gm-dashboard' (the last module containing it), overwriting the correct '/financial-overview' mapping.
reproduction_steps: Observe sub-nav shows GM module items instead of Finance module items
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove 'Financial Overview' from GM sub-menu (line 100 in AppHeader.jsx) since it already exists in the Finance module. Alternative: Modify buildPathMap to check if the path equals the module key and prioritize that mapping.
